pages.text: Constructed humanoid. Mechanical body, synthetic intelligence. Plated frame, sealed against most biological hazards.$(br2)Height: 1.0$(br)Width: 0.65$(br2)$(bold)Constructed Body.$(/) Cannot eat organic food.$(br2)$(bold)Autonomous Power.$(/) Hunger does not deplete; the hunger bar stays full.$(br2)$(bold)Repair Core.$(/) Iron nuggets, ingots, and blocks are edible and heal directly: 1, 4, and 10 hearts respectively.$(br2)$(bold)Sealed Systems.$(/) Immune to Poison, Weakness, Slowness, Mining Fatigue, Nausea, Blindness, Wither, Hunger, Levitation, Bad Omen, and Darkness effects.$(br2)$(bold)Plated Hide.$(/) Armor +1 at all times.$(br2)$(bold)Lightning Rod.$(/) Lightning damage taken doubled.$(br2)$(bold)Heavy Frame.$(/) Swim speed -25%.
